# Orca Investment

> Orca Investment is a professional trading journal and risk-management platform for active traders, featuring automated journaling, behavioral analytics, an economic radar, and a weekly AI review — bilingual (Hebrew/English).

## Pages

- [Landing](/welcome): Product overview, features, pricing, and free launch access.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Account access (email + password, Google sign-in).
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Legal terms and platform usage policy.
